title: Canonical skill
description: Target contract for .agents/skills/<id>/SKILL.md frontmatter. Validérbar via .agents/scripts/validate-schemas.py (PR B schema-modning, 2026-07-10). Opdateret status: .agents/skills har nu 79 skills (efter skills-flytningen 2026-07-09), og name-vs-trigger-normaliseringen er LØST — alle skills bærer nu et 'name'-felt (banebyg fik name 2026-07-10; de øvrige via .codex-versionerne). 'trigger' er nu et valgfrit supplement, ikke en erstatning for name.

name.description: Lowercase-hyphen; MUST equal the skill directory name (validate-harness checks name==dir).

description.description: What the skill does + when to use it (trigger intent embedded in prose).

trigger.description: Optional supplemental trigger keywords. Supplement to name+description, NOT a replacement for name.

version.description: Optional semantic version. Allowed because Higgsfield skills carry it.

status.description: FORELOEBIG = placeholder/provisional. 'candidate' = source-library capability not yet an active skill.

source.description: Origin, e.g. mattpocock-skills (vendor), Banedanmark domain, higgsfield-ai/skills.

runtime_support.description: Adapter ids that can render/execute this skill. Planned; not populated in PR B.

$comment: Scope note (opdateret 2026-07-10): .agents/skills = 79 skills (canonical efter flytning 2026-07-09); .vscode/.codex/skills er tømt til kun 'banebyg'; root skills/ er slettet; vendor read-only copies ligger under .agents/vendor/. Denne schema targeter det canonical .agents-lag. AFGJORTE (tidligere åbne) beslutninger: 73-vs-33 skill-reconciliation er LØST (.agents canonical, 79 skills); name-vs-trigger-normalisering er LØST (alle skills har name). STADIG ÅBNE: source-library capability CANDIDATES (design-artifacts, visual-explainer, deep-research — se docs/agents/sources/) er ejer PR C.
